title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 20 2026
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 20 2026
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 20 2026
summary:
Main
Today, DCE iron ore futures exhibited a steadly up-trend , with I2609 contract ultimately setiling at 778.5 RMB per tonne,representing an increase of 0.39% from the previous trading session. Conversely, physical spot prices experienced a decline of 3 to 5 RMB per tonne compared to the preceding day. Whilst traders actively presented their offers, steelmakers procured strictly on an as-needed basis, resulting in a scarcity of market inquiries and a largely muted overall physical transaction environment.Regarding fundamental data, the latest statistics from SMM indicate that aggregate iron ore inventories across 35 major national ports stood at 152.58 million tonnes, marking a period-on-period decline of 610,000 tonnes and reflecting a marginal destocking trend.
